obs: Attended weekday Italian cooking class in winter at local culinary school with Chef Maria; learned to make Spaghetti Bolognese and found sauce surprisingly easy to prepare.
Growing indoor plant collection for 3 months; noticed significant air quality improvement in living room from plants.
Interested in adding orchid to plant collection; wants beginner-friendly guidance on care requirements.
Spider plant infested with pests; treating with neem oil every few days for pest management.
Owns 5 plants: snake plant, spider plant, peace lily, dracaena, basil; waters all on Sunday mornings.
Craving Italian food, especially pasta dishes with seafood; interested in exploring new recipes beyond previous cooking class experience.
Tried carne asada tacos at new Mexican restaurant near house recently; portion was huge with leftovers for next day lunch.
Craving sweet Italian desserts; interested in trying traditional Italian dessert recipes.
Been wanting to try Korean BBQ; considering finding authentic Korean BBQ restaurant in area.
Got 12-pack eggs from Walmart for $1.99 last Saturday; thinking of sweet omelettes with strawberries and cream cheese.
Considering store-brand cream cheese options like Great Value from Walmart instead of premium Philadelphia brand.
Has Greek yogurt from Costco bought last month; considering using in sweet omelette recipe with strawberries.
Taking fitness classes for recreation at local gym for past 3 months; noticed significant improvements in flexibility and overall physical ability.
Gets quite sweaty during yoga practice; looking for yoga mats with good grip for sweaty hands and feet.
Considering getting fitness tracker to monitor progress and stay motivated on current fitness routine.
Finished binge-watching season 3 of Stranger Things in one week; looking for similar sci-fi/horror show recommendations.
Planning TV show marathon party with theme, decorations, snacks, costume contest, and trivia activities.
Traveled solo to Japan before; found experience empowering but sometimes felt lonely in evenings; wants to connect with people while traveling solo.
Planning trip to Europe; considering solo vs group travel; when in Japan, was able to change plans on whim to explore spontaneously.
Recently upgraded to TP-Link Archer AX50 router from Amazon for ~$150; has been huge improvement so far.
Experiencing slow internet speeds, especially in evening when multiple devices connected; issues started few days ago and persist after restarts.
Best friend moved to new city for work few weeks ago; not hanging out as much anymore; feeling isolated and lonely as result.
Been wanting to try hiking trail near house but putting it off; looking for hiking group or buddy to explore with.
Planning to rearrange living room; want to maximize space for growing plant collection; has 12x15 feet rectangular room with large window.
Prefers modern minimalist style with neutral color palette (whites, grays, beiges) for interior design; has sectional sofa and coffee table already.
Recently gave sister set of kitchen utensils costing ~$70 as gift.
Started vinyl collecting 3 months ago; focusing on favorite genre; open to discovering new music; familiar with brands like Discogs and eBay.
Owns rare pressing of The Cure's 'Wish' album in vinyl collection.
Searching for original 1991 UK pressing of My Bloody Valentine's 'Loveless' on Creation Records; has been elusive but has leads.
Planning to start YouTube channel to showcase collection and share tips with collectors; interested in storytelling approach.
Branching out from vinyl records into coins and sports cards collections; finds coin research and minting processes fascinating.
Collects vintage baseball cards from 1950s-60s; owns rare cards featuring Mickey Mantle and Willie Mays; researched players and teams from era.
Repotted fiddle leaf fig tree 2 weeks ago; spent ~1.5 hours carefully handling roots and adding fertilizer to new soil; plant doing great.
Recently got 3 new plants during spring sale at local nursery: snake plant, spider plant, peace lily; excited to watch them grow.
Spent ~1.5 hours at nursery spring sale picking healthiest plants and chatting with staff about plant care.
Living in Tokyo for 5 months; big adjustment but loving the experience so far.
Taking Japanese lessons at local language school with teacher Yuka-sensei; learning useful phrases and vocabulary; studying for communication.
Attending weekly language exchange event in Omotesando for language practice and meeting new people.
Recently joined gym in area offering yoga classes in English; looking to try new studios and instructors.
Prioritizing physical and mental health since moving to Tokyo; yoga helps relax and unwind; wanting to explore natural areas of Japan.
Been to Chicago before and loved the city; previous visit included exploring city center; fell in love with Chicago.
Traveled to Japan April 15-22; fell in love with Tokyo during previous visit.
Repotted basil plant on March 5th; doing great and being used actively in cooking.
Made delicious pesto pasta dish using homegrown basil on March 15th.
Growing Instagram presence; experimenting with hashtags; mix of niche and broad hashtags gets more likes and comments.
Got shoutout from official #FitnessBliss account which boosted followers by 5.
Top engaging hashtags tracked: #sustainability, #ecofriendly, #zerowaste; most successful during 12-3pm posting hours.

Replaced old kitchen faucet with new Moen touchless sensor model last Sunday; very convenient feature.
Got bunch of fresh ripe tomatoes from farmer's market; cooking more at home lately.
Started compost bin in backyard to reduce food waste; helping with sustainable living goals.
Getting better at meal planning and grocery shopping with purpose to reduce waste.
Recently attended workshop on capturing cityscapes at night; interested in exploring other photography themes.
Particularly interested in street portrait photography theme; wants to learn how to approach people for permission.
Excited to try making sushi bowls at home; wants to learn about unique sushi creations beyond traditional rolls.
Planning to visit unique sushi restaurants; interested in Jiro's Sushi in Tokyo and other Michelin-starred sushi establishments.
Thinking of getting mountain bike serviced at REI before taking it on trails; wants tune-up before hitting trails.
Planning hike this weekend in Denver area; wants 3-5 miles moderate difficulty with elevation gain and scenic mountain/forest views.
Selling 2012 Nissan Versa that's been sitting in driveway for months; considering $4,500 pricing slightly below market to sell quickly.

Selected Covercraft UV108 Custom Fit Cover for 2018 Honda sedan; planning to purchase on Amazon.
Interested in Weimar Republic's cultural and artistic movements; studying Expressionism, Bauhaus, Surrealism influences on European art.

Planning to start training for marathon; looking for structured training plan and nutrition advice.
Interested in learning about frog and toad differences, habitats, toxic species, color-changing abilities, and other amphibian facts.
